summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in colocation (Colo) with 264 signals, driven by established operators scaling in Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Uttar Pradesh, and Telangana. The top policy hook is state-level data centre policies, notably UP’s cabinet-approved 2026 policy targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment and Gujarat’s 2026-29 policy. Value-chain movers are Colo and Build layers, with foreign hyperscalers like Amazon showing established/scaling presence via job postings in Hyderabad and Mumbai. This run’s foreign-hyperscaler India moves are led by Amazon (12 active), with AirTrunk, Equinix, and Google monitoring or scaling.
